error.auth.password_login_unsupported: Password login is not available in this environment.
error.user.role_required: Signing up requires choosing a role (worker or contractor).
error.user.invalid_role: The selected role is not valid.
error.user.credentials_required: Signing up requires a username, email, and password.
error.user.email_taken: This email address is already in use.
error.user.suspended: This account is suspended. Please contact support.
error.user.not_approved: Your account must be approved before doing this.
error.onboarding.wrong_role: Your account role cannot perform this action.
error.document.not_owned: The specified document was not found or is not accessible.
error.visa.card_required: Non-Japanese workers must upload a residence card (front and back).
error.visa.expiry_required: A visa expiry date is required.
error.visa.expired: The visa has expired, so approval/confirmation is blocked.
error.insurance.freelance_required: Freelance (一人親方) workers need proof of labor insurance.
error.job.out_of_area: This area is outside the service area for now. Please join the waitlist.
error.job.trade_not_allowed: The selected trade is not currently accepted.
error.job.not_editable: Only open jobs can be edited.
error.job.edit_window_closed: This job can no longer be edited within {hours} hours of its start time.
error.job.terms_locked: Workers are already confirmed, so the job terms are locked (only notes, photos, and headcount increases can be changed).
error.job.headcount_below_confirmed: Headcount cannot be set below the number of confirmed workers.
error.application.job_not_open: This job is not currently accepting applications.
error.admin.user_exists: A user with this phone number already exists.
error.admin.debug_disabled: Debug tools are disabled in this environment.
error.application.already_applied: You have already applied to this job.
error.application.not_pending: This application cannot be acted on in its current state.
error.matching.checkin_too_early: Check-in opens {minutes} minutes before the start time.
error.matching.checkin_window_closed: The work shift has already ended, so check-in is no longer possible.
error.matching.completion_not_requested: The worker has not reported completion yet.
error.review.not_completed: Only completed matchings can be reviewed.
error.review.already_reviewed: You have already left this review.
terms.body.employment_daylabor:
This Day-Labor Employment Agreement is entered into between {company} (the "Employer") and {worker} (the "Worker").
1. Engagement: The Employer engages the Worker as a day laborer for work on {date} at the designated site.
2. Wages: A daily wage of JPY {wage}, paid in cash on site upon completion, in accordance with the Labor Standards Act.
3. Hours and breaks: As posted for the job; statutory breaks apply.
4. Insurance and safety: Workers' accident compensation insurance follows the site's coverage; the Worker shall follow all site safety instructions.
5. Cancellation: Either party may cancel under CRAFT-ON's cancellation policy; no-shows may affect the Worker's reliability rating.
6. Conduct: The parties shall transact only through CRAFT-ON and shall not exchange private contact details to bypass the platform.
7. Governing law: The laws of Japan; disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court.
terms.body.subcontract:
This Subcontract Agreement is entered into between {company} (the "Orderer") and {worker}, a sole proprietor (the "Contractor").
1. Work: The Orderer subcontracts the work scheduled for {date} at the designated site to the Contractor.
2. Fee: JPY {wage}, paid in cash on site upon completion. The Contractor is responsible for completing the work.
3. Independence: The Contractor is not an employee and no employment relationship arises; working method is at the Contractor's discretion within the site's requirements.
4. Insurance: The Contractor maintains their own accident/labor coverage (e.g. sole-proprietor 労災).
5. Cancellation: Per CRAFT-ON's cancellation policy; no-shows may affect the Contractor's reliability rating.
6. Conduct: The parties shall transact only through CRAFT-ON and shall not exchange private contact details to bypass the platform.
7. Governing law: The laws of Japan; disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court.
terms.disclaimer: Note: this is auto-generated provisional wording for Phase 1 and is pending review by qualified professionals (social-insurance/tax/legal).
